Member Function Documentation

◆ init()

void BiLinearPieceWiseFunctionService::init ( )
virtual

Initialisation.

Define boundary behavior of tabulated function

Fill table vector by vector Assume Indexes values are strictly increasing check is done by addTableVector

Init PieceWiseFunctionR1vR1T<BiLinearInterpolator> (must be done after filling table)
